summary: Italy's posture is led by the National Cybersecurity Agency, whose guidance on post-quantum and quantum cryptography references the NIST standardisation process and the EU material on the transition. The Bank of Italy is active on the financial-sector side, having run post-quantum experiments in real payment systems through the BIS Project Leap.
govActors:
ACN | Agenzia per la Cybersicurezza Nazionale, guidance on post-quantum and quantum cryptography referencing the NIST process and EU transition material
Banca d'Italia | Bank of Italy, post-quantum experiments in real payment systems via BIS Project Leap and notices on the G7 financial-sector roadmap
Senato | Italian Senate documents covering the defence multi-year acquisition programme including post-quantum cryptography and national PQC activities
provenance: summary + govActors (ACN): ACN post-quantum and quantum cryptography guidance row and the European joint-position announcement

dominantProcess NIST: ACN guidance summary explicitly references the NIST PQC standardization process (alongside EU material). No Italian sovereign scheme stated, so NIST assigned, though the EU-coordination dimension is also present - REVIEW
Banca d'Italia role: Project Leap 2 results, BIS Project Leap phase 2, and G7 financial-sector roadmap rows (the BIS speech row is included:false and not relied on)
Senato role: SMD 41/2025 multi-year programme and Doc. CCXVIII no. 3 rows
standardFamilies / algorithms / migrationTimeline / targetCompletion: OMITTED, no dated milestones, FIPS families or algorithm names stated in the included Italian summaries
